decision.rationale:
The plate honors all cited identity rules perfectly: 
- IR.claude-mascot.face.two-dot-eyes-with-brows is honored: The face contains exactly two small oval eyes, taller than wide, capped by short curved brows and positioned symmetrically on the construction cross-lines without a prominent mouth.
- IR.claude-mascot.anatomy.no-hair is honored: The top surface and sides of the rounded box remain completely clean and bare with no hair, tufts, cowlicks, or hair-like growths (only the standard anatomical side nubs are present).
- IR.claude-mascot.face.construction-cross-line is honored: A faint pencil construction cross-line is clearly visible on the front face, bisecting it vertically and horizontally.
- IR.claude-mascot.palette.terracotta-orange-body is honored: The body has a flat terracotta clay-orange fill (#C77C52) with no color gradient.
- IR.claude-mascot.style.warm-graphite-line-cross-hatch is honored: All line work is rendered with varied weight warm-graphite pencil line, and shadows on the far side, under-planes, and limbs are drawn strictly as warm-graphite cross-hatching over the flat orange fill.
